name: Paulie
description:
__Height:__ 195cm (6'5")
__Affiliations:__ Galley-La Company

Paulie is one of the five Dock One foremen, specializing in rigging, knots, and masts. He became an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the end of the Water 7 Arc and the beginning of the Enies Lobby Arc. Paulie is often seen with a cigar in his mouth. His denim jacket has a flame detail, many of his cigars strapped to it (in a similar fashion to Smoker), and a big "1" printed on its back, most likely referring to Dock 1.

~!Later on, Paulie became the current vice president of the Galley-La Company in Water 7.!~

(Source: One Piece WIki)
